rows.label: qev030301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Huh...? You people there,
you aren't from the Cavern Clan, are you?
Could it be... Brother!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_SEL0011
rows.name: Playfully lie and say you are Rada's older brother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_SEL0021
rows.name: Explain that you aren't his brother, but you came to save Rada.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0002
rows.name:
...No, my brother doesn't sound like that, zo.
What are you trying to achieve by tricking me, da? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Eh? You came to save me?
I've been captured this whole time and things are rough on my end, da.
I don't need jokes like that, zo... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0004
rows.name:
I see... The Tree Clan really doesn't abandon their kin, da.
We're different from those heartless Cavern Clan bastards, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0005
rows.name:
Ah... now that I'm relieved,
all the strength has drained from my body...
I guess I'll take you up on your offer and let you save me, zo? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0006
rows.name:
The key to this room should be held by a Cavern Clan Bias
named Mujiba Falgo, da.
Please defeat him and go get it. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0007
rows.name:
This room... it's dark, it stinks, it's the worst, da.
Please, I want you to get me out of here fast, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0008
rows.name:
The key to the room is held by a Cavern Clan Bias
named Mujiba Falgo, da.
I'm counting on you, zo. Get me out of here fast... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0009
rows.name: Yay! I'm saved, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0010
rows.name:
Now, if only brother Oll gets saved...
I have no more business in a place like this, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0011
rows.name:
...That's right, da! I have a favor to ask, da.
My brother is also captured in this fortress, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Please!
I want you to save my brother too, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Eh!?
You've already saved brother Oll!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0014
rows.name:
Ah... Thank you!
You really are an amazing person, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0015
rows.name:
Then I'm going back to where my brother is!
I'm going to tell him that I wasn't just crying and screaming, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0016
rows.name:
...You'll really do it for me, na!
If a strong-looking person like you goes,
he'll definitely be alright, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0017
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, zo!
You have to save my brother! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Ah! That's right, da!
Lately, those Cavern Clan guys have been taming
these dangerous beasts called Simius, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030301_MSG0019
rows.name:
It might be a good idea to get some Kepha Holly,
since Simius hate it, zo! [ST:wait ]
